arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford ‘spot on’ and change would do him good – Roy Keane
arts.sum: The Manchester United forward said this week he is ‘ready for a new challenge’.

arts.ttl: What Ruben Amorim wanted Marcus Rashford to do after dropping transfer bombshell
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford dropped the revelation he wants to leave Manchester United in a bombshell interview earlier this week, with his manager Ruben Amorim left blindsided

arts.ttl: Tottenham drop triple Man Utd team news hint as Ange Postecoglou discovers winning formula
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur remain hopeful the Carabao Cup will be their method of ending the club's 16-year trophy drought, returning to the competition on Thursday with a quarter-final clash against Manchester United. Spurs and their rivals will do battle in North London, hoping to be named alongside Arsenal, Liverpool and Newcastle United amongst the last four in contention for the first piece of silverware of the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils suffer blow 'in pursuit' of highly-rated forward
arts.sum: Manchester United suffer a blow in their alleged pursuit of Kenan Yildiz, with the Turkey international committing himself to Juventus.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton names the Manchester United player Marcus Rashford should take inspiration from
arts.sum: The 27-year-old was left out of the side altogether for Sunday's Manchester derby against crosstown rivals City, and on Tuesday gave a bombshell interview which spoke of leaving Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Player would prefer move to Tottenham – Spurs seen as ‘more prestigious’ than London rivals
arts.sum: Earlier this month, Tottenham Hotspur were mentioned as a potential suitor for Juventus midfielder Nicolo Fagioli. It was suggested that the Italian’s agent is listening to offers from clubs outside Italy and that he has been excluded from the project at the Turin giants. arts.ttl: 'Doesn't improve you': Fabio Capello slams club for signing £13m Tottenham man, thinks he's not good enough
Sir Jim Ratcliffe increases Manchester United stake
arts.sum: The Ineos chairman now owns 28.94 per cent of the club after completing agreed infrastructure investments.
